title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Mothercare India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Mothercare India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mothercare India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Mothercare India:
Mothercare India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mothercare India!
